Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "SPEEDBALL2-0840-C000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0840 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Speedball 2.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0840 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts. 2. Copies 512 bytes of data from $0872 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this is the state the memory was in after the depacker from the original game had finished - this allows us to skip this slow step). 3. Sets the correct border and screen colours. 4. Clears the stack. 5. And finally jumps to the entry point at $C000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
